ch2_start.text: You are awakened by the blaring of the station's general alarm. Red emergency lights bathe your quarters in a harsh glow. The station shudders violently.

choices.text: Grab your emergency rebreather first, then run out.

ch2_corridor.text: The corridor is chaotic. Water is pooling at your feet. An automated voice blares: 'CAVERN INTEGRITY COMPROMISED. LOWER MAINTENANCE FLOODING. QUARANTINE PROTOCOL INITIATED.' You see Miller sprinting towards the lower levels.

choices.text: Follow Miller down to Lower Maintenance.

ch2_escape_attempt.text: You run for the escape pods, but a heavy quarantine blast door slams shut right in front of you. You are trapped in Sector B. You have no choice but to head down to Lower Maintenance.

choices.text: Turn back and head to Lower Maintenance.

ch2_lower_maint.text: You find Miller wrestling with a jammed manual override wheel on the main pressure door. Behind the thick glass, dark, sludgy water is rising fast. But it's not just water. A dark, writhing mass is moving within it, slamming against the glass.
ch2_lower_maint.speaker: Miller

ch2_question_miller.text: 'Just pull, dammit!' Miller screams, veins bulging in his neck. The glass cracks under the pressure of the mass.
ch2_question_miller.speaker: Miller

ch2_help_miller.text: You both pull with all your might. The wheel groans, turning an inch. Suddenly, the glass shatters. The dark mass surges through, wrapping around Miller's leg. It burns through his suit like acid.

ch2_pull_miller.text: You grab Miller's arm, but the mass is too strong. It's pulling him into the flooded chamber. 'Go!' he screams. 'Lock the secondary door! Save the upper decks!' He kicks you back.

choices.text: Run to the secondary door and seal it.

ch2_abandon_miller.text: You stumble backward in horror. Miller looks at you, betrayal flashing in his eyes before determination takes over. 'Lock the secondary door!' he roars, as the mass engulfs him.

choices.text: Run to the secondary door and seal it.

ch2_seal_door.text: You scramble through the secondary bulkhead and hit the emergency seal. The heavy steel doors slam shut, cutting off Miller's screams. You watch through the porthole as he is pulled under by the writhing darkness.

choices.text: Use your rebreather to calm your hyperventilation.

ch2_end.text: Miller is dead. Whatever that was, it wasn't just water. It was alive. The intercom crackles: 'Sector A secured. All survivors report to the central hub.' The nightmare has begun.
